svg.text: The form raised to its own inverse: flipped AND reversed = self-referential fixed point

g.text: Each vertex acts on each anti-vertex → 9 interactions
Double Fold: M·Mᵀ = symmetric fixed point
3×3 at 3D level = W9 crown at 12D level — holographic encoding

svg.text: Double Fold Cascade: D² at Every Level

g.text: w² = i/2 → two folds = pure rotation at half magnitude → the Möbius body IS the double fold of the seed
